name: security-orchestra
description: 50+ specialized AI agents & 8 compound chains for data center critical power infrastructure

tools.name: get_capabilities
tools.description: List all available agents, chains, and their parameters. Returns the full tool catalog with descriptions, required inputs, credit costs, and standards references.

tools.name: subdomain_discovery
tools.description: Discover subdomains for a target domain using DNS brute-force, certificate transparency, and passive sources

tools.name: asset_discovery
tools.description: Map IP addresses, open ports, technologies, and cloud assets for a target domain

tools.name: vulnerability_assessment
tools.description: Run vulnerability scans against a target and return prioritized findings with remediation guidance

tools.name: generator_sizing
tools.description: Size generators for data center loads with industry-standard compliance. Returns genset kVA, fuel consumption, tank size, runtime, ATS sizing, and cost estimates.

tools.name: utility_interconnect
tools.description: Analyze utility interconnect requirements for major US power providers. Returns per-load-size timelines, deposit $/kW ranges, first-year cost, competitive intel, and constraint warnings.

tools.name: pue_calculator
tools.description: Calculate Power Usage Effectiveness (PUE) and efficiency metrics for data center facilities. Analyzes IT load, cooling systems, power distribution, and provides optimization recommendations.

tools.name: construction_cost
tools.description: Estimate construction costs for data center development. Analyzes $/MW costs, regional pricing factors, tier requirements, and provides detailed cost breakdowns for shell, electrical, mechanical, and IT infrastructure.

tools.name: nfpa_110_checker
tools.description: Check emergency generator compliance per NFPA 110 Level 1 and Level 2 requirements. Validates fuel capacity, ATS transfer time, runtime hours, and returns compliance status with violation details and remediation steps.

tools.name: ats_sizing
tools.description: Size automatic transfer switches per NEC Articles 700, 701, and 702. Calculates load current, applies 125% continuous load factor, selects standard ATS ratings, and returns enclosure options and installation requirements.

tools.name: ups_sizing
tools.description: Size uninterruptible power supplies per IEEE 485 and 1184. Calculates kVA, selects battery strings (VRLA or Li-ion), determines runtime across N/N+1/2N configurations, and provides cost estimates.

tools.name: fuel_storage
tools.description: Design diesel fuel storage systems for emergency generators. Calculates tank size, runtime, secondary containment, SPCC thresholds, NFPA 30 compliance, and day tank recommendations.

tools.name: cooling_load
tools.description: Calculate data center cooling load per ASHRAE TC 9.9. Computes IT heat, UPS losses, envelope gains, converts to tons, sizes CRAC/CRAH units with N+1 redundancy, and checks ASHRAE thermal envelopes.

tools.name: power_density
tools.description: Analyze rack power density for data centers. Classifies kW/rack density, sizes PDUs and branch circuits per NEC 645, calculates airflow requirements, and provides expansion capacity analysis.

tools.name: redundancy_validator
tools.description: Validate data center redundancy design against Uptime Institute Tier I-IV standards. Identifies single points of failure, assesses concurrent maintainability, and maps achieved tier with gaps to next level.

tools.name: demand_response
tools.description: Model utility demand response program participation for backup generator fleets. Calculates curtailment capacity, annual revenue, response time requirements, and program eligibility by utility.

tools.name: environmental_impact
tools.description: Assess environmental impact of data center generator operations. Calculates NOx/PM2.5/CO2 emissions per USEPA AP-42, air permit thresholds, CEQA/NEPA triggers, and mitigation requirements.

tools.name: fire_suppression
tools.description: Design clean agent fire suppression systems per NFPA 2001 and NFPA 75. Calculates agent quantity (FM-200, Novec 1230, Inergen, CO2), cylinder count, nozzle layout, and discharge time.

tools.name: incentive_finder
tools.description: Identify federal and state financial incentives for data center projects. Analyzes IRA tax credits, state grants, utility rebates, enterprise zone benefits, and job creation incentives by state.

tools.name: noise_compliance
tools.description: Analyze generator noise compliance with local ordinances. Calculates sound pressure levels at property line using inverse-square law, assesses zoning compliance, and recommends mitigation.

tools.name: permit_timeline
tools.description: Estimate permitting timeline and critical path for data center construction. Analyzes building, electrical, mechanical, fire, and environmental permits by jurisdiction type and project scope.

tools.name: roi_calculator
tools.description: Calculate return on investment for data center capital projects. Computes NPV, IRR, simple payback, discounted payback, and cumulative cash flow using DCF analysis.

tools.name: tco_analyzer
tools.description: Analyze total cost of ownership for data center operations. Breaks down power, cooling, labor, hardware refresh, maintenance, and facility costs over a multi-year horizon.

tools.name: fiber_connectivity
tools.description: Analyze fiber connectivity options and costs for a data center location. Evaluates carrier diversity, dark fiber vs lit services, latency to key markets, and redundancy paths.

tools.name: harmonic_analysis
tools.description: Perform harmonic analysis per IEEE 519 for data center power systems. Calculates total harmonic distortion (THD), voltage THD, and recommends filters and transformer derating.

tools.name: site_scoring
tools.description: Score and rank candidate data center sites across power, connectivity, risk, regulatory, and cost dimensions. Accepts a JSON array of site objects with attributes.

tools.name: voltage_drop
tools.description: Calculate voltage drop for data center power distribution circuits per NEC 210.19. Computes percent drop, conductor sizing recommendations, and NEC 647 compliance for sensitive loads.

tools.name: water_availability
tools.description: Assess water availability and consumption for data center cooling systems. Estimates daily/annual consumption, water stress risk, permit requirements, and recycled water options.

tools.name: network_topology
tools.description: Design spine-leaf network topology for data center switching fabric. Calculates spine/leaf switch counts, uplink ratios, oversubscription, port requirements, and cabling inventory.

tools.name: bandwidth_sizing
tools.description: Size north-south and east-west bandwidth for data center network fabric. Estimates aggregate throughput, uplink capacity, peering requirements, and recommends fabric speed.

tools.name: latency_calculator
tools.description: Calculate propagation latency for data center interconnects. Computes one-way and round-trip delay by medium (fiber, copper, wireless, microwave) and hop count.

tools.name: ip_addressing
tools.description: Design IP addressing and VLAN architecture for data center networks. Calculates subnet sizes with growth buffer, prefix lengths, VLAN counts, and management IP allocations.

tools.name: dns_architecture
tools.description: Design DNS architecture for data center environments. Recommends authoritative and recursive server counts, anycast deployment, DNSSEC requirements, and QPS capacity.

tools.name: bgp_peering
tools.description: Design BGP peering architecture for data center edge routing. Calculates route reflector requirements, memory for full tables, session counts, and convergence estimates.

tools.name: physical_security
tools.description: Design physical security systems for data centers per Uptime Institute tier standards. Calculates security zones, guard staffing, camera counts, access control points, and annual cost.

tools.name: biometric_design
tools.description: Design biometric access control systems for data center security zones. Calculates reader counts, FAR/FRR performance, throughput capacity, and enrollment database sizing.

tools.name: surveillance_coverage
tools.description: Design CCTV surveillance coverage for data center facilities. Calculates camera counts, field of view, storage requirements, and retention compliance for each resolution.

tools.name: cybersecurity_controls
tools.description: Map cybersecurity controls for data center compliance frameworks. Analyzes SOC 2, ISO 27001, NIST CSF, PCI DSS, and FedRAMP control requirements, SIEM sizing, and implementation effort.

tools.name: compliance_checker
tools.description: Check multi-framework compliance posture for data center operations. Identifies control overlaps, gaps, and prioritized remediation across simultaneous compliance programs.

tools.name: chiller_sizing
tools.description: Size water-cooled and air-cooled chillers for data center cooling plants. Calculates cooling tons, chiller plant configuration, N+1/2N sizing, and annual energy consumption.

tools.name: crac_vs_crah
tools.description: Compare CRAC vs CRAH unit selection for data center cooling. Analyzes EER/COP differences, annual energy cost, water availability constraints, and recommends optimal configuration.

tools.name: airflow_modeling
tools.description: Model airflow patterns for data center hot/cold aisle containment. Estimates CFM requirements, delta-T across racks, bypass airflow percentage, and hotspot risk by containment type.

tools.name: humidification
tools.description: Design humidification and dehumidification systems per ASHRAE A1 envelope. Calculates moisture load, equipment capacity, energy consumption, and seasonal control strategy.

tools.name: economizer_analysis
tools.description: Analyze economizer free-cooling potential for data center locations. Estimates annual free-cooling hours by climate, blended PUE improvement, energy savings, and simple payback.

tools.name: construction_timeline
tools.description: Estimate construction timeline for data center development projects. Provides phase-by-phase schedule (design, permits, civil, MEP, commissioning) with state-specific regulatory modifiers.

tools.name: commissioning_plan
tools.description: Generate commissioning plan per ASHRAE Guideline 1.2 for data center infrastructure. Calculates Level 1-4 test hours, witness testing requirements, and integrated systems testing scope.

tools.name: maintenance_schedule
tools.description: Build annual preventive maintenance schedule for data center infrastructure. Calculates PM labor hours, intervals, and annual cost for generators, UPS, cooling, and electrical systems.

tools.name: capacity_planning
tools.description: Project data center capacity runway and expansion trigger points. Uses logarithmic growth modeling to forecast years to 80% utilization, critical threshold, and end-of-design-life load.

tools.name: sla_calculator
tools.description: Calculate SLA availability metrics against Uptime Institute tier benchmarks. Computes allowed downtime minutes/year, MTTR budget, and compliance status for target availability percentage.

tools.name: change_management
tools.description: Design change management process for data center operations. Defines CAB frequency, change windows, rollback SLA, and staffing model based on tier classification and change volume.

tools.name: carbon_footprint
tools.description: Calculate data center carbon footprint per GHG Protocol Scope 2. Computes location-based and market-based emissions using eGRID factors, renewable energy certificates, and carbon intensity.

tools.name: solar_feasibility
tools.description: Assess rooftop solar PV feasibility for data center facilities. Calculates system capacity, annual generation, energy offset percentage, IRA tax credit (30%), and simple payback.

tools.name: battery_storage
tools.description: Size battery energy storage systems for data center applications. Supports Li-ion, LFP, VRLA, and flow chemistries for UPS backup, peak shaving, demand response, and islanding use cases.

tools.name: energy_procurement
tools.description: Analyze energy procurement strategies for large data center loads. Compares utility tariffs, PPAs, green tariffs, and direct access contracts with estimated annual cost and renewable content.

tools.name: tier_certification_checker
tools.description: Evaluate data center readiness for Uptime Institute Tier I-IV certification. Produces a gap analysis with remediation costs, readiness score, and priority steps.

tools.name: nc_utility_interconnect
tools.description: Model the interconnect application process for Duke Energy Progress, Duke Energy Carolinas, or Dominion Energy NC. Returns utility-specific steps, timeline, fees, NCUC filing requirements, and data center considerations.

tools.name: chain_full_power_analysis
tools.description: Generator sizing -> NFPA 110 compliance -> UPS sizing -> ROI calculator. Complete power infrastructure analysis in one request.

tools.name: chain_site_readiness
tools.description: Site scoring -> Tier certification -> Utility interconnect -> Compliance check. Full site evaluation pipeline.

tools.name: chain_tco_deep_dive
tools.description: PUE calculator -> Cooling load -> TCO analyzer. Full cost of ownership analysis.

tools.name: chain_nc_power_package
tools.description: NC utility interconnect -> Generator sizing -> NFPA 110 -> UPS sizing. North Carolina specific full power analysis.

tools.name: chain_emergency_power_package
tools.description: UPS sizing -> ATS sizing -> Generator sizing -> Fuel storage -> NFPA 110. Complete emergency power system design.

tools.name: chain_cooling_optimization
tools.description: Cooling load -> Chiller sizing -> CRAC vs CRAH -> Airflow modeling -> Economizer analysis. Full cooling system design.

tools.name: chain_full_site_analysis
tools.description: Site scoring -> Tier certification -> Utility interconnect -> Permit timeline -> Construction cost -> Construction timeline. Complete site feasibility study.

tools.name: chain_sustainability_package
tools.description: Carbon footprint -> Solar feasibility -> Battery storage -> Energy procurement -> Environmental impact. Full green energy analysis.
